ConceptScheme URI: This exemple illustrates the use of prefix declarations. Here, 3 prefixes are defined above :
The prefix 'euvoc' is used as the prefix of a colum
The prefix 'days' is used as the prefix of the concept URIs
The prefix 'concept-status' is used as the prefix a colum value

column3: The day where you get back at work
The most productive day of the week.

column6: Note that some consider Sunday to be the first day of the week. Should we give ordering numbers to weekdays ?

column7: Check with Andrew if the concept of Week-end is the same in the US, in China and the UK. Try to determine a universal notion of what a 'week-end' is.
